usage: loadViolationReport [-help] -filename <string> [-orient <string>] [-rulemap <string>] -type {Assura Calibre PVS Hercules ICV CDNLitho CDNCMP inShapeLitho CalibreLitho DRV ClockTran CLP VerifyPower} [-xoffset <float>] [-yoffset <float>]

options.name: -orient
options.description: transform orient: <R0 | R90 | R180 | R270 | MX | MX90 | MY | MY90>

options.name: -rulemap
options.description: specify rule map file for PVS,Calibre Litho,Calibre report

options.name: -type
options.description: {Assura Calibre PVS Hercules ICV CDNLitho CDNCMP inShapeLitho CalibreLitho DRV ClockTran CLP VerifyPower} Violation type: <Assura|Calibre|PVS|Hercules|ICV|CDNLitho|CDNCMP|inShapeLitho|CalibreLitho|DRV|ClockTran|CLP|VerifyPower>
